name: Blue Cheese Pasta with Bergamot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in plenty of boiling, salted water until al dente.
2. Drain the pasta and transfer it to a serving dish.
3. Toss with the parsley and oil; season to taste.
4. Sprinkle the cheese over the top, then toss in the bergamot petals.
5. Serve immediately.
Note: Personally, I think the walnut oil goes better with this.
From Cooking with Flowers by Jenny Leggatt. New York: Fawcett Columbine, 1987. Pg. 105. ISBN 0-449-90252-8.
